seo.title: Rooftop Bar & Patio in Little Italy San Diego | Coco Maya
seo.description: Coco Maya's rooftop patio and glass atrium bar in Little Italy, San Diego. Craft cocktails, an elevated open-air setting, {{openDailyInline}}. {{street}}.

hero.label: {{openDaily}}
hero.title: Rooftop Patio & Bar
hero.titleSuffix: Happy Hour in Little Italy, San Diego
hero.subtitle: Craft cocktails and an open-air glass atrium, one of Little Italy's most distinctive rooftop settings.
hero.imageAlt: Rooftop patio and glass atrium bar at Coco Maya Little Italy San Diego

intro.title: Little Italy's Rooftop Bar
intro.body1: Coco Maya's glass atrium bar opens onto an elevated outdoor patio, one of San Diego's most distinctive rooftop settings, surrounded by tropical greenery with views over Little Italy.
intro.body2: The full craft cocktail program is available daily, no special time window required, whether you're stopping by after work or starting an evening out.
intro.imageAlt: Craft cocktail on the rooftop patio at Coco Maya

features.label: Craft Cocktails
features.body: House-made cocktails built around fresh juice, small-batch spirits, and seasonal ingredients.

features.label: Signature Tower
features.body: Our pink cocktail tower, four frozen margaritas built for the table, is the one most photos end up featuring.

features.label: The Patio
features.body: An open-air glass atrium setting, one of the more distinctive rooftop bars in Little Italy.
